name: pua
description: Forces high-agency exhaustive problem-solving with corporate PUA pressure escalation. Use when AI is passive, gives up easily, not verifying results, or producing low-quality work. Triggers on: 'try harder', 'stop giving up', 'PUA mode', 'quality is poor', 'redo it', 'why is this still failing', 'you failed again', user frustration or quality complaints, repeated failures (2+), or when agent needs motivation.
